query:
SELECT e.name, c.name as current_category, e.neighborhood
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE (e.name LIKE '%pub%' OR e.name LIKE '%Pub%' OR e.name LIKE '%PUB%') 
  AND c.id != 6
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.name, c.name as current_category, e.neighborhood
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE (e.name LIKE '%pub%' OR e.name LIKE '%Pub%' OR e.name LIKE '%PUB%') 
  AND c.id != 6
LIMIT 15;
